Item.name: Sheba Faele ea Hona Joale ho
Sephutheli joalo ka Sebaka sa Mosebetsi
Kwala Litokomane Tsohle EMPA tse Pintsoeng
Koala Tsohle ka ho le Letshehadi
Koala Tsohle ka ho Le letona
Kenya hape ho tsoa ho Disk
Bula Sephutheli joalo ka Sebaka sa Mosebetsi...
Qala/Qetella Khetha ka Mokhoa oa Kholomo
Tlosa Mela e Kopanetsoeng e Kopanetsoeng
Hlopha Mela ea Lexicographically Ho nyoloha
Hlopha Mela e Theohang ka Lexicographical
Hlopha Lines Lex.Nyeoe ea ho Itlhokomoloha
Hlopha Lines Lex.Ho theoha ha Nyeoe ea ho Itlhokomoloha
Hlopha Mela ka Taelo ea Sebaka e eang holimo
Hlopha Mela ka Taelo ea Sebaka e theohang
Hlopha Mela Ka Bolelele bo Nyolohang
Hlopha Mela ka Bolelele bo Theohang
Hlopha Mela Joalo ka Linomoro Tse Nyolohang
Hlopha Mela Ha Linomoro li Theoha
Hlopha Mela Joalo ka Li-Decimal (Comma) Ho nyoloha
Hlopha Mela Joalo ka Li-decimal (Comma) Ho theoha
Hlopha Mela Joalo ka Decimal (Dot) Ho nyoloha
Hlopha Mela Joalo ka Decimal (Dot) Ho theoha
Bula Sephutheli se Nang le ho Sebatli
Etsolla Likhetho tse ngata tsa morao-rao tse kentsoeng
Tlola Hona Joale Eya ho E 'ngoe ea likhetho tse ngata tse latelang
Fokotsa Sebaka se ka Sehloohong le se Tsamaeang
Fokotsa ka bobeli le EOL ho Space
Boloka Macro e Rekotiloeng Hona Joale...
Bala Feela ho Tokomane ea Hona Joale
Bala Feela Bakeng sa Litokomane Tsohle
Hlakola E Baloang Feela Bakeng sa Litokomane Tsohle
Kopitsa Tsela ea Hona Joale ea Lifaele
Tšobotsi ea ho Bala Feela ho Windows
Tlosa Mela e Hloekileng (E Nang le litlhaku tse se nang letho)
Kenya Blank Line Kaholimo ho Hona Joale
Kenya Blank Line Ka tlase ho Hona Joale
Tlosa Mela e sa ngolisoang ka Bookmark
Kgetha Tsohle tse Pakeng tsa {} [] kapa ()
Sephutheli joalo ka Sebaka sa Mosebetsi
Hlahisa Litlhaku tsa Taolo Unicode EOL
Fetola Mokhoa oa Sekrine se Tletseng
Bula sephutheli sa User Defined Language...
Pokello ea Lipuo Tse Hlalositsoeng ke Basebelisi Notepad++
Hlahisa ho tsoa ho khetho ho clipboard
Hlahisa ho tsoa ho khetho ho clipboard
Hlahisa ho tsoa ho khetho ho clipboard
Hlahisa ho tsoa ho khetho ho clipboard
Lethathamo le Hloekileng la Lifaele Tsa Haufinyane
Tsela ea Z ho ea ho A
Mofuta oa A ho ea ho Z
Mofuta oa Z ho ea ho A
Bolelele ba Litaba bo ea nyoloha
Bolelele ba Litaba bo ea theoha
Nako e Fetohileng e ea nyoloha
Nako e Fetohileng e ea theoha
Koala Tsohle ka ho Le letona
Bula Sephutheli se Nang le ho Sebatli
Bula Folder e nang le cmd
Bula Sephutheli se nang le Sephutheloana joalo ka Sebaka sa Mosebetsi
Tšobotsi ea ho Bala Feela ho Windows
Kopitsa Tsela e Felletseng ea Lifaele
Fetola Tsohle Litokomaneng Tsohle Tse Butsoeng
Fumana Tsohle Litokomaneng Tsohle Tse Butsoeng
Fumana Tsohle ho Tokomane ea Hona Joale
⤵ Kopitsa ho tloha ho Fumana ho ea ho Replace
⤴ Kopitsa ho tsoa sebakeng sa ho Fumana
Litlhaku tseo e seng tsa ASCII (128–255)
Ha o khone ho ea hole ho feta:

MD5FromFilesDlg.title: Hlahisa MD5 digest ho tsoa lifaeleng

Item.name: Tšoara mola o mong le o mong e le khoele e arohaneng

SHA256FromFilesDlg.title: Hlahisa SHA-256 digest ho tsoa lifaeleng

Item.name: Khetha lifaele tseo u ka li hlahisang SHA-256...
Tšoara mola o mong le o mong e le khoele e arohaneng

SHA1FromFilesDlg.title: Hlahisa SHA-1 digest ho tsoa lifaeleng

Item.name: Khetha lifaele tseo u ka li hlahisang SHA-1...
Tšoara mola o mong le o mong e le khoele e arohaneng

SHA512FromFilesDlg.title: Hlahisa SHA-512 digest ho tsoa lifaeleng

Item.name: Khetha lifaele tseo u ka li hlahisang SHA-512...
Tšoara mola o mong le o mong e le khoele e arohaneng
Sebaka sa polokelo ea lenane la plugin
Qobella 'mala oa bokapele bakeng sa mefuta eohle
Qobella bokamorao ba mebala bakeng sa mefuta eohle
Qobella khetho ea litlhaku bakeng sa mefuta eohle
Qobella khetho ea boholo ba fonte bakeng sa mefuta eohle
Qobella khetho e sebete bakeng sa mefuta eohle
Qobella khetho e sekameng bakeng sa mefuta eohle
Qobella khetho ea setaele bakeng sa mefuta eohle

ConflictInfoOk.name: Ha ho likhohlano tse khaoletsang bakeng sa ntho ena.

Item.name: Bula foldara e nang le ho Explorer
Bula sephutheli se nang le Command Prompt
Phetoho ea EOL ho Windows (CR LF)
Setaele kaofela u sebelisa mokhoa oa pele
Setaele kaofela u sebelisa mokhoa oa bobeli
Setaele kaofela u sebelisa mokhoa oa boraro
Setaele kaofela u sebelisa mokhoa oa 4
Setaele kaofela u sebelisa mokhoa oa bohlano
Mokhoa oa pele o sebelisa mokhoa oa pele
Mokhoa oa pele o sebelisa mokhoa oa bobeli
Mokhoa oa pele o sebelisa mokhoa oa boraro
Mokhoa oa pele o sebelisa mokhoa oa 4
Mokhoa oa pele o sebelisa mokhoa oa bohlano
Setaele se fetileng sa mofuta oa pele
Mokhoa o fetileng oa mofuta oa bobeli
Mokhoa o fetileng oa mokhoa oa bo-5
Setaele se fetileng sa Find Mark style
Mokhoa o latelang oa mokhoa oa pele
Mokhoa o latelang oa mofuta oa bobeli
Setaele se latelang sa Find Mark style
Copy Styled Text of All Styles
Kopitsa mongolo o hlophisitsoeng oa mofuta oa Find Mark
Sheba faele ea hajoale ho Firefox
Sheba faele ea hajoale ho Chrome
Sheba faele ea hajoale ho IE
Sheba faele ea hajoale ho Edge
Fetolela Sephutheli joalo ka Sebaka sa Mosebetsi
Fetolela ho Folder joalo ka Sebaka sa Mosebetsi
Hlopha ka Lebitso la A ho ea ho Z
Hlopha ka Lebitso la Z ho isa A
Hlophisa ka Tsela ea A ho ea ho Z
Hlophisa ka Tsela ea Z ho ea ho A
Hlopha ka Mofuta oa A ho ea ho Z
Hlopha ka Mofuta oa Z ho ea ho A
Hlophisa ho ea ka Bolelele ba Boitsebiso bo nyolohang
Hlophisa ho ea ka Bolelele ba Litaba bo theoha
Sena se tla tlosa shortcut taelong ena
Mena compact (mena le mela e se nang letho)
Ho mena ka mokhoa oa 2 oa khoutu (ho hlokahala likarohano)
Ho mena ka mokhoa oa maikutlo
Dumella sebaka se sesweu se tlang pele
Mokhoa oa ho fana ka maikutlo
|Pata (sebelisa konopo ea Alt kapa F10 ho fetola)
E Tlatsitse Fluent UI: e nyane
E Tlatsitse Fluent UI: e kholo
Notlela (ha ho ho hula le ho theola)
Fetola 'mala oa tab e sa sebetseng
Thala bar e mebala ho tab e sebetsang
Hlahisa likonopo ho li-tab tse sa sebetseng
Tsoa ka ho koala tab ya ho qetela
Etsa hore litaelo tsa hajoale tse menahang / tse sa phutholohang li fetolehe
Thibela karolo e tsoetseng pele ea ho phenya ka lebaka la taba ea touchpad
Lumella ho tsamaisetsa ka nqane ho mola oa ho qetela
Boloka khetho ha u tobetsa ka ho le letona ka ntle ho khetho
Numella Copy/Cut Line ntle le khetho
Kenya 'mala o ikhethileng ho mongolo o khethiloeng
Etsa hore ho be le mekhoa e mengata ea ho fetola (Ctrl+Mouse to/ho khetha)
Numella Khetho ea Kholomo ho Liphetoho tse ngata
Kenya litlhophiso tsa Ponahalo ho C0, C1 Unicode EOL
Thibela ho ngola tlhaku ea taolo (khoutu ea C0) ho tokomane
UTF-16 Big Endian e nang le BOM
Etsa kopo ho lifaele tsa ANSI tse butsoeng
Bula tokomane e ncha kamehla qalong
Sebelisa mola oa pele oa tokomane joalo ka lebitso la tab e se nang sehlooho
Hopola buka ea ho qetela e sebelisitsoeng
Bula lifaele tsohle tsa foldara ho fapana le ho qala Folder joalo ka Sebaka sa Mosebetsi ho foldareng e theoha
Ka kopo, tsoa Notepad++ 'me u tsosolose Notepad++ ka mokhoa oa Administrator ho sebelisa tšobotsi ena.
Etsa hore lenane la puo le kopane
Tšoara backslash joalo ka sebopeho sa phonyoho bakeng sa SQL
Backspace key unindents sebakeng sa ho tlosa sebaka se le seng
Ha ho na bokamorao ba mmala
Karolo e ka ho le letšehali
Karolo e ka ho le letšehali

Element.name: Tsela e feletseng ea lebitso la faele

Item.name: Mona bonts'a litlhophiso tsa hau tse feto-fetohang
Sebelisa mohala o nang le sebaka se le seng lebokoseng la Fumana (O hloka ho qala Notepad++ bocha)
Fumana puisano e lula e butsoe ka mor'a ho batla e hlahang fensetereng ea liphetho
Netefatsa Hore Tlosa Tsohle Litokomaneng Tsohle Tse Butsoeng
Fetola: Se ke oa fetela ketsahalong e latelang
Fesetere ea Sephetho sa Patlo: bonts'a keno e le 'ngoe feela moleng o fumanoeng haeba ho khonahala
Ha Puisano ea ho Fumana e Bitsoa
Tlatsa Sebaka sa Fumana ka Mongolo o Khethiloeng
Khetha Lentsoe le Tlas'a Caret ha ho se Ntho e Khethiloeng
Boholo bo fokolang ba ho Itlhahlobe ka Boiketsetso "Ka khetho":
Tlatsa Fumana ho Files Directory Field Thehilwe On Active Document
: Litlhaku tse Hloahloa ho Tlatsa Sebaka sa Fumana ka Boiketsetso ho tsoa ho Khetho
Se ke oa sheba ka nako ea ho qala
Sets'oants'o sa kopano le bekapo ea nako le nako
Dumella senepe sa seshene le bekapo ya nako le nako
Qala ho boloka bekapo ho liphetoho ho e 'ngoe le e' ngoe
Hopola lenaneo la hajoale bakeng sa phatlalatso e latelang
Hopola lifaele tse sa fihlelleheng tsa lenaneo le fetileng
Bukana ea ho boloka e Tloaelehileng
Lumella ho phethela ka boits'oaro ho mongolo o mong le o mong
Etsa lethathamo la ho tlatsa ka bokhutšoanyane
Liparamente tsa tšebetso li fana ka leseli mabapi le ho kenya
Bula seshene ketsahalong e ncha ('me u boloke nako ka bo eona ha u tsoa)
E lula e le maemong a mangata
* Phetoho ea tlhophiso ena e hloka ho qala Notepad++
Khutlisetsa morao tatellano ea nako ea kamehla (lifomate tse telele tse khutšoane)
Hopola boemo ba phanele (phanele e butsoe) maemong a mang (mokhoa oa mefuta e mengata) kapa ha o sebelisa parameter ea mola oa taelo [-nosession]
Sephutheli joalo ka Sebaka sa Mosebetsi
Litlhophiso tsa khetho ea Delimiter (Ctrl + Mouse tobetsa habeli)
Sebelisa lethathamo la litlhaku tsa Lentsoe la kamehla kamoo le leng kateng
Kenya semelo sa hau joalo ka karolo ea lentsoe (u se ke ua e khetha ntle le haeba u tseba seo u se etsang)
Numella Thibelo e Kholo ea Faele (ha ho tlhakiso ea syntax)
Hlalosa Boholo ba Faele e Kholo:
Tlosa Word Wrap lefatšeng ka bophara
Dumella Sehokelo se Tobehang sa URL
Hatisa temoso ha u bula lifaele tsa ≥2GB
Beha tsela ea sebaka sa hau sa maru mona:
Lumella mokhoa oa lebokose le felletseng
Beha sebaka sa hau sa ho batla mona:
Ho Fumana Boemo ba Faele ka Boiketsetso
Tsamaisetsa moleng oa ho qetela ka mor'a ho ntlafatsa
Hlahisa feela filename ho bar ea sehlooho
Itlhahlobe ka ho iketsa khouto ea litlhaku
Faele ea sebaka sa mosebetsi ext.:
Numella lebokose la ho netefatsa hore Save All
Matha ho fihlela qetellong ea faele

Na ehlile u batla ho boloka litokomane tsohle tse fetotsoeng?
Khetha "Kamehla e" haeba u sa batle ho bona puisano ena hape. O ka kenya tshebetsong puisano ena hape ho Dikgethollo hamorao.
Kopitsa lintlha tsa tharollo ho clipboard
Ha ho polokelo ea git\nSebelisa Browse ho bula repo.
Khetha foldara ea polokelo ea git
Hlopha mesebetsi (A ho ea ho Z)
Faele e khethiloeng ea lenaneo ha e na li-tab.
Rekota macro pele u sebelisa Start Recording.
Hlahisa tsela e felletseng ea faele ka har'a bareng ea sehlooho
Sekhahla sa ho panya ha Caret (ms):
Ha ho likhohlano tse khaoletsang bakeng sa ntho ena.
Qala sesebelisoa bocha ho kenya li-plugins tse kentsoeng.
Puo e Hlalositsoeng ke Mosebelisi v.2.1
Khoasolla hape ho tsoa ho Disk
Ha e khone ho Sheba Lintlafatso
Sena se tla hlakola lifaele tsa plugin.
Ha ho na Macros e Bolokiloeng
Lebitso la taelo bakeng sa menu ea Run
Mongolo o tšoailoeng o kopitsitsoe ho clipboard.
Ha ho mongolo o tšoailoeng o ka kopitsoang.
Fetola ho Merero: Ha e so hokahane.
Fumana ho Merero: Ha e so hokahane le lenane la lifaele tsa Project Panel.
Sebaka sa ho sebetsa se fetotsoe.
Na u batla ho boloka liphetoho?
Tsamaisetsa ho feta mola oa ho qetela
Thibela mongolo o khethiloeng oa ho hula
Khatiso e bohlale: mokotla oa papali
Ho totobatsa ka bohlale: lentsoe kaofela feela
Hlahisa konopo ea koala ho li-tab
Hopola ponahalo ea phanele ho pholletsa le mananeo
Boloka lifaele li le sieo nakong ea kopano
Netefatsa Tlosa Tsohle litokomaneng tse bulehileng
Fetola: se fetele ketsahalong e latelang
Sebelisa mohala o nang le sebaka se le seng ho Fumana lebokose
Tlanya ka ho le letona ho boloka khetho
Sebelisa li-parser tsa lenane la tšebetso tse thehiloeng ho XML
Li-brackets tsa ho koala ka bohona ( ) [ ] { }
Ho tsoa ho sebapali sa Nth:
Mohaho oa khetho ea ho itlhahloba (li-byte):
Sebaka sa polokelo ea lenane la plugin
Khetha faele ea XML ea sehlooho sa Notepad++ eo u ka e sebelisang
Boleng ba boleng bo tlameha ho ba 0-255 mme qalo e be <= pheletso.
Qala hape Notepad++ ho nchafatsa moelelo oa kamehla oa Menu.xml.
Faele e na le liphetoho tse sa bolokoang.Ho kenya khouto e ncha ho tla li lahla.Na u batla ho tsoela pele?
Ha ho karabo ho tsoa ho seva.
Sebaka sa polokelo e ka ba sa lekunutu.
Lifaele tse ling tsa puo (.xml) li ka kenngoa ho:
Tlola amp ea hona joale;Eya ho Next Multi-select

ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.title: Editing contextMenu
ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.message: Ho hlophisa contextMenu.xml ho u lumella ho fetola menu ea hau ea popup++ popup. U tlameha ho qala Notepad++ ea hau bocha hore e sebetse ka mor'a ho fetola contextMenu.xml.

SaveCurrentModifWarning.title: Boloka Phetoho ea Hona Joale
SaveCurrentModifWarning.message:
U lokela ho boloka phetoho ea hajoale. Liphetoho tsohle tse bolokiloeng li ke ke tsa etsolloa.
Na u batla ho tsoela pele?

LoseUndoAbilityWarning.title: Lahleheloa Hlakola Temoso ea Bokhoni
LoseUndoAbilityWarning.message:
U lokela ho boloka phetoho ea hajoale. Liphetoho tsohle tse bolokiloeng li ke ke tsa etsolloa.
Na u batla ho tsoela pele?

CannotMoveDoc.title: Fetela ho Notepad++ e ncha Instance
CannotMoveDoc.message: Tokomane e fetotsoe, e boloke ebe u leka hape.

DocReloadWarning.title: Kenya hape
DocReloadWarning.message: Na u na le bonnete ba hore u batla ho kenya faele ea hajoale bocha 'me u lahleheloe ke liphetoho tse entsoeng ho Notepad++?

FileLockedWarning.title: Ho boloka ho hlolehile
FileLockedWarning.message: Ka kopo sheba hore na faele ena e buletsoe lenaneong le leng

FileAlreadyOpenedInNpp.message: Faele e se e butsoe ho Notepad ++.

RenameTabTemporaryNameAlreadyInUse.title: Ho reha bocha ho hlotsoe
RenameTabTemporaryNameAlreadyInUse.message: Lebitso le boletsoeng le se le ntse le sebelisoa tabeng e 'ngoe.

RenameTabTemporaryNameIsEmpty.title: Ho reha bocha ho hlotsoe
RenameTabTemporaryNameIsEmpty.message: Lebitso le boletsoeng le ke ke la hloka letho, kapa le ke ke la ba le sebaka kapa libaka kapa TAB feela.

NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.title: Lifaele tse lokelang ho buloa li kholo haholo
NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.message: $INT_REPLACE$ files are about to be opened. Are you sure you want to open them?

SettingsOnCloudError.title: Litlhophiso ho Cloud
SettingsOnCloudError.message: Ho bonahala eka tsela ea litlhophiso ho leru e behiloe ho drive ea ho bala feela, kapa foldareng ho hlokahala tokelo ea tokelo bakeng sa phihlello ea ho ngola. Litlhophiso tsa hau ho cloud li tla hlakoloa.Ka kopo, seta botjha boleng bo momahaneng ka puisano ya Dikgethollo.

FilePathNotFoundWarning.title: Faele Bula
FilePathNotFoundWarning.message: Faele eo u lekang ho e bula ha e eo.

SessionFileInvalidError.title: Ha e khone ho Laola Session
SessionFileInvalidError.message: Faele ea Session e senyehile kapa ha e sebetse.

DroppingFolderAsProjectModeWarning.title: Ketso e fosahetseng
DroppingFolderAsProjectModeWarning.message: U ka liha lifaele kapa lifoldara feela empa eseng ka bobeli, hobane u ntse u theola Folder joalo ka Projeke. U tlameha ho nolofalletsa "Bula lifaele tsohle tsa foldara ho e-na le ho qala Folder e le Sebaka sa Mosebetsi ho foldareng e theohang" karolong ea "Default Directory" ea Likhetho ho etsa hore ts'ebetso ena e sebetse.

SortingError.title: Phoso ea ho Hlopha
SortingError.message: Ha re khone ho hlophisa linomoro ka lebaka la mola $INT_REPLACE$.

SortLocaleMultiple.title: Hlophisa ha e etsoe
SortLocaleMultiple.message: Ho hlopha likhetho tse ngata ha hoa tšehetsoa.

SortLocaleUnknown.title: Hlophisa E hlolehile
SortLocaleUnknown.message: Lebaka leo mofuta o hlōlehileng ka lona ha le khone ho tsejoa.

ColumnModeTip.title: Keletso ea Mokhoa oa Kholomo
ColumnModeTip.message:
Ho na le mekhoa e 3 ea ho fetohela ho mokhoa oa ho khetha likholomo:
1. (Keyboard le Mouse) Tšoara Alt ha u ntse u penya ka ho le letšehali
2. (Keyboard feela) Tšoara Alt+Shift ha u ntse u sebelisa linotlolo tsa metsu
3. (Keyboard kapa Tweba) Beha caret qalong eo u e batlang ea sebaka sa block block, ebe etsa taelo ea "Qala / Qetella ho Khetha ka Mokhoa oa Kholomo"; Tsamaisa caret pheletsong e lakatsehang ea sebaka sa block block, ebe etsa taelo ea "Qala / Qetella ho Khetha ho Mokhoa oa Kholomo" hape

BufferInvalidWarning.title: Ho boloka ho hlolehile
BufferInvalidWarning.message: Ha e khone ho boloka: Buffer ha e sebetse.

DoCloseOrNot.title: Boloka faele e seng teng
DoCloseOrNot.message: Faele "$STR_REPLACE$" ha e sa le eo. Boloka faele ee e le mohlophisi?

DoDeleteOrNot.title: Hlakola faele
DoDeleteOrNot.message: Faele "$STR_REPLACE$" e tla fetisetsoa ho Recycle Bin ea hau mme tokomane ena e tla koaloa. Na u batla ho tsoela pele?

NoBackupDoSaveFile.title: Boloka
NoBackupDoSaveFile.message: Faele ea hau ea bekapo ha e fumanehe (e hlakotsoe kantle). E boloke ho seng joalo data ea hau e tla lahleha Na u batla ho boloka faele "$STR_REPLACE$" ?

DoReloadOrNot.title: Kenya hape
DoReloadOrNot.message:
"$STR_REPLACE$"
Faele ena e fetotsoe ke lenaneo le leng. Na u batla ho e kenya hape?

DoReloadOrNotAndLooseChange.title: Kenya hape
DoReloadOrNotAndLooseChange.message:
"$STR_REPLACE$"
Faele ena e fetotsoe ke lenaneo le leng. Na u batla ho e kenya hape 'me u lahleheloe ke liphetoho tse entsoeng ho Notepad++?

PrehistoricSystemDetected.title: Sistimi ea prehistoric e fumanoe
PrehistoricSystemDetected.message: Ho bonahala o ntse o sebelisa sistimi ea prehistoric.Karolo ena e sebetsa feela tsamaisong ea sejoale-joale, masoabi.

XpUpdaterProblem.title: Notepad++ Updater
XpUpdaterProblem.message: Notepad++ updater ha e tsamaellane le XP ka lebaka la lera la tšireletso le sa sebetseng tlas'a XP. Na u batla ho ea leqepheng la Notepad++ ho khoasolla mofuta oa morao-rao?

GUpProxyConfNeedAdminMode.title: Litlhophiso tsa Proxy
GUpProxyConfNeedAdminMode.message: Ka kopo qala Notepad++ hape ka mokhoa oa Admin ho lokisa proxy.

DocTooDirtyToMonitor.title: Bothata ba ho beha leihlo
DocTooDirtyToMonitor.message: Tokomane e litšila.Ka kopo, boloka phetoho pele u e beha leihlo.

DocNoExistToMonitor.title: Bothata ba ho beha leihlo
DocNoExistToMonitor.message: Faele e lokela ho ba teng hore e behoe leihlo.

FileTooBigToOpen.title: Bothata ba boholo ba faele
FileTooBigToOpen.message: Faele e kholo haholo hore e ka buloa ke Notepad++

FileLoadingException.title: Mokhelo khoutu: $STR_REPLACE$
FileLoadingException.message: Ho hlahile phoso ha re bula faele!

WantToOpenHugeFile.title: Ho bula temoso e kholo ea faele
WantToOpenHugeFile.message: Ho bula faele e kholo ea 2GB+ ho ka nka metsotso e mengata. O batla ho e bula?

CreateNewFileError.title: Theha faele e ncha
CreateNewFileError.message: Ha re khone ho theha faele "$STR_REPLACE$".

OpenFileNoFolderError.title: Ha e khone ho bula faele
OpenFileNoFolderError.message: "$STR_REPLACE1$" ha e khone ho buloa: Sephutheli "$STR_REPLACE2$" ha se teng.

FileBackupFailed.title: Boloka Lifaele E hlolehile
FileBackupFailed.message:
Mofuta o fetileng oa faele ha o khone ho bolokoa bukeng ea bekapo ho "$STR_REPLACE$".
Na u batla ho boloka faele ea hajoale?

LoadLangsFailed.title: Configurator
LoadLangsFailed.message: Langs.xml e hlotsoe! Na u batla ho khutlisa langs.xml ea hau?

FolderAsWorspaceSubfolderExists.title: Sephutheli joalo ka Sebaka sa Mosebetsi se eketsa bothata ba foldara
FolderAsWorspaceSubfolderExists.message: Sephutheli se senyane sa sephutheli seo u batlang ho se kenya se teng. Ka kopo tlosa motso oa eona phanele pele o kenya sephutheli "$STR_REPLACE$".

ProjectPanelChanged.title: $STR_REPLACE$
ProjectPanelChanged.message: Sebaka sa ho sebetsa se fetotsoe.O batla ho e boloka?

ProjectPanelSaveError.title: $STR_REPLACE$
ProjectPanelSaveError.message: Ho hlahile phoso ha u ntse u ngola faele ea sebaka sa mosebetsi. Sebaka sa hau sa mosebetsi ha se so bolokoe.

ProjectPanelOpenDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.title: Bula Sebaka sa Mosebetsi
ProjectPanelOpenDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.message: Sebaka sa hona joale sa mosebetsi se fetotsoe.Na u batla ho boloka morero oa hajoale?

ProjectPanelNewDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.title: Sebaka se Secha sa Mosebetsi
ProjectPanelNewDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.message: Sebaka sa hona joale sa mosebetsi se fetotsoe.Na u batla ho boloka morero oa hajoale?

ProjectPanelOpenFailed.title: Bula Sebaka sa Mosebetsi
ProjectPanelOpenFailed.message: Sebaka sa tšebetso ha se khone ho buloa. Ho bonahala faele e lokelang ho buloa ha se faele ea projeke e nepahetseng.

ProjectPanelRemoveFolderFromProject.title: Tlosa sephutheli ho morero
ProjectPanelRemoveFolderFromProject.message: Lintho tse nyane kaofela li tla tlosoa. Na ehlile u batla ho tlosa sephutheli see mosebetsing?

ProjectPanelRemoveFileFromProject.title: Tlosa faele ho morero
ProjectPanelRemoveFileFromProject.message: Na ehlile u batla ho tlosa faele ee mosebetsing?

ProjectPanelReloadError.title: Khutlisa Sebaka sa Mosebetsi
ProjectPanelReloadError.message: Ha e khone ho fumana faele eo u ka e kenyang bocha.

ProjectPanelReloadDirty.title: Khutlisa Sebaka sa Mosebetsi
ProjectPanelReloadDirty.message: Sebaka sa hona joale sa mosebetsi se fetotsoe.Ho kenya hape ho tla lahla litokiso tsohle. Na u batla ho tsoela pele?

UDLNewNameError.title: Phoso ea UDL
UDLNewNameError.message: Lebitso lena le sebelisoa ke puo e 'ngoe, ke kopa o fane ka e 'ngoe.

UDL_saveBeforeImport.title: Puo e Hlalositsoeng ke Mosebelisi
UDL_saveBeforeImport.message: Pele o romela kantle, boloka tlhaloso ea puo ea hau ka ho tobetsa konopo ea "Save As...".

SCMapperDoDeleteOrNot.title: U na le bonnete?
SCMapperDoDeleteOrNot.message: Na ehlile u batla ho hlakola tsela ee e khaoletsang?

FindCharRangeValueError.title: Bothata ba Boleng bo fapaneng
FindCharRangeValueError.message: O lokela ho ngola pakeng tsa 0 le 255.

OpenInAdminMode.title: Ho boloka ho hlolehile
OpenInAdminMode.message: Faele e ka se bolokehe mme e kanna ya sireletsoa. Na u batla ho qala Notepad ++ ka mokhoa oa Administrator?

OpenInAdminModeWithoutCloseCurrent.title: Ho boloka ho hlolehile
OpenInAdminModeWithoutCloseCurrent.message: Faele e ka se bolokehe mme e kanna ya sireletsoa. Na u batla ho qala Notepad ++ ka mokhoa oa Administrator?

OpenInAdminModeFailed.title: Ho buloa ka mokhoa oa Administrator ho hlotsoe
OpenInAdminModeFailed.message: Notepad ++ e ke ke ea buloa ka mokhoa oa Administrator.

ViewInBrowser.title: Sheba Faele ea Hona Joale ho Sebatli
ViewInBrowser.message: Sesebelisoa ha se fumanehe ho sistimi ea hau.

ExitToUpdatePlugins.title: Notepad++ e mothating oa ho tsoa
ExitToUpdatePlugins.message: Haeba u tobetsa YES, u tla tlohela Notepad++ ho ntšetsa pele ts'ebetso. Notepad ++ e tla qala hape kamora hore lits'ebetso tsohle li felisoe. Na u batla ho tsoela pele?

NeedToRestartToLoadPlugins.title: Notepad++ e hloka ho hlahisoa bocha
NeedToRestartToLoadPlugins.message: U tlameha ho qala Notepad ++ hape ho kenya li-plugins tseo u li kentseng.

ChangeHistoryEnabledWarning.title: Notepad++ e hloka ho hlahisoa bocha
ChangeHistoryEnabledWarning.message: U tlameha ho qala Notepad ++ hape ho nolofalletsa Phetoho ea nalane.

WindowsSessionExit.title: Notepad++ - Ho tsoa ha nako ea Windows
WindowsSessionExit.message: Session ea Windows e haufi le ho felisoa empa u na le data e sa bolokoang.Na u batla ho tsoa Notepad++ hona joale?

LanguageMenuCompactWarning.title: Menu ea Puo e Kopanetsoeng
LanguageMenuCompactWarning.message: Khetho ena e tla fetoloa lenaneong le latelang.

SwitchUnsavedThemeWarning.title: $STR_REPLACE$
SwitchUnsavedThemeWarning.message: Liphetoho tse sa bolokehang li haufi le ho lahloa! Na u batla ho boloka liphetoho tsa hau pele u fetola lihlooho?

MacroAndRunCmdlWarning.title: Macro le Run Commands Compatibility
MacroAndRunCmdlWarning.message:
Litaelo tsa hau tsa Macro le Run tse bolokiloeng ho Notepad ++ v.8.5.2 (kapa ho feta) li ka 'na tsa se ke tsa lumellana le phetolelo ea morao-rao ea Notepad ++. Ka kopo, leka litaelo tseo, 'me, ha ho hlokahala, u li hlophise bocha.
Ntle le moo, o ka theolela ho Notepad ++ v8.5.2 mme o khutlisa data ea hau e fetileng. Notepad++ e tla boloka "shortcuts.xml" ea hau ea khale 'me e e boloke e le "shortcuts.xml.v8.5.2.backup". Ho reha "shortcuts.xml.v8.5.2.backup" -> "shortcuts.xml", litaelo tsa hau li lokela ho khutlisoa 'me li sebetse hantle.

FullReadOnlySavingForbidden.title: Ho boloka ho hlolehile
FullReadOnlySavingForbidden.message: Ha e khone ho boloka faele. Mokhoa o thibetsoeng oa ho boloka ho bala feela oa Notepad++ o thibetse faele ho bolokoa.

NotEnoughRoom4Saving.title: Ho boloka ho hlolehile
NotEnoughRoom4Saving.message: E hlolehile ho boloka faele. Ho bonahala eka ha ho na sebaka se lekaneng disk ho boloka faele.Faele ea hau ha e ea bolokoa.

FileInaccessibleUserSession.title: Faele ha e fumanehe
FileInaccessibleUserSession.message:
Lifaele tse ling tsa lenaneo leo u li bolokileng ka letsoho "$STR_REPLACE$" ha li fumanehe.Li ka buloa e le litokomane tse se nang letho le tse baloang feela joalo ka litšoantšiso.
O ka rata ho theha litšoantšiso tseo?
ELA HLOKO: Ka ho khetha ho se thehe litšoantšiso kapa ho se koala hamorao, seshene sa hau se bolokoang ka letsoho TLA HLOKOA ha u tsoa.

FileInaccessibleDefaultSessionXml.title: Faele ha e fumanehe
FileInaccessibleDefaultSessionXml.message:
Lifaele tse ling tsa nakong e fetileng ha li fumanehe.Li ka buloa e le litokomane tse se nang letho le tse baloang feela joalo ka litšoantšiso.
O ka rata ho theha litšoantšiso tseo?
ELA HLOKO: Ka ho khetha ho se thehe litšoantšiso kapa ho li koala hamorao, lenaneo la hau le TLA FETOLA HA U TSOA!Re khothaletsa hore u boloke "session.xml" ea hau hona joale.

RTLvsDirectWrite.title: Ha e khone ho matha RTL
RTLvsDirectWrite.message: RTL ha e tsamaisane le mokhoa oa DirectWrite.Ka kopo tima mokhoa oa DirectWrite ho MISC.karolo ea Likhetho, 'me u qale Notepad++ hape.

FileMemoryAllocationFailed.title: Mokhelo: Kabo ea memori ea faele e hlotsoe
FileMemoryAllocationFailed.message: Mohlomong ha ho na memori e lekaneng ea mahala bakeng sa faele e laetsoeng ke Notepad ++.

FindRegexBackwardDisabled.title: Regex backward search e koetsoe
FindRegexBackwardDisabled.message:
Ka kamehla, ho batla ka morao ho regex ho koetsoe ka lebaka la liphetho tse ka bang teng tse neng li sa lebelloa.Ho batlisisa ka morao, bula lebokose la Fumana 'me u khethe mokhoa oa ho batla o tloaelehileng kapa o atolositsoeng ho fapana le polelo e tloaelehileng. Tobetsa konopo ea OK ho bula lebokose la Fumana kapa ho beha tsepamiso ho eona.
Haeba o hloka karolo ea morao-rao ea ho batla regex, sheba bukana ea mosebelisi bakeng sa litaelo tsa ho e nolofalletsa.

PrintError.message: Ha e khone ho qala tokomane ea khatiso.

FindAutoChangeOfInSelectionWarning.title: Batla temoso
FindAutoChangeOfInSelectionWarning.message: Boemo ba lebokose la "Ho khetha" bo fetotsoe ka bohona. Ka kopo, netefatsa boemo ba ho batla pele u etsa ketso.

Need2Restart2ShowMenuShortcuts.title: Notepad++ e hloka ho qalisoa bocha
Need2Restart2ShowMenuShortcuts.message: Notepad ++ e hloka ho qalisoa bocha ho bonts'a likhutšoane tse nepahetseng tsa menyu.

NoAdminRight2ChangeReadOnlyFileAttribute.title: Ho hloleha ho fetola faele e baloang feela
NoAdminRight2ChangeReadOnlyFileAttribute.message: Ka kopo, tsamaisa Notepad ++ joalo ka molaoli ho fetola litšobotsi tsa faele.

PreferencesInitialSort.name: Hlopha mesebetsi (A ho ea ho Z) ka mokhoa oa kamehla

PanelTitle.name: Sephutheli joalo ka Sebaka sa Mosebetsi

SelectFolderFromBrowserString.name: Kgetha foldara eo o ka e kenyang ho Folder joalo ka phanele ea Sebaka sa Mosebetsi

Item.name: Kenya Lifaele ho tsoa ho Directory...
Kenya Lifaele ho tsoa ho Directory...

word-chars-list-tip.value: Sena se o lumella ho kenyelletsa litlhaku tse ling ho litlhaku tsa hajoale ha o ntse o tobetsa habeli ho khetha kapa o batla ka khetho ea "Match whole word only" e khethiloe.

eol-custom-color-tip.value: Eya ho Style Configurator ho fetola mmala wa kamehla wa EOL ("EOL custom color")..

backup-select-folder.value: Khetha foldara e le bukana ea bekapo

cloud-restart-warning.value: Ka kopo qala Notepad++ bocha hore e sebetse.

cloud-select-folder.value: Khetha foldara ho tloha/ho ea moo Notepad++ e balang/e ngolang litlhophiso tsa eona

default-open-save-select-folder.value: Khetha foldara e le bukana ea kamehla

shift-change-direction-tip.value: Sebelisa Shift+Enter ho batla ka nqa e 'ngoe

find-in-files-filter-tip.value:
Fumana ho cpp, cxx, h, hxx hpp: *.cpp *.cxx *.h *.hxx *.hpp
Fumana lifaeleng tsohle ntle le exe, obj log: *.* !*.exe !*.obj !*.log
Fumana lifaeleng tsohle empa u se kenye liteko tsa lifoldara, bin bin64: *.* !\liteko !\bin*
Fumana lifaeleng tsohle empa u se kenye lifaele tsohle tsa log kapa logs ka makhetlo a mangata: *.* !+\log*

find-in-files-select-folder.value: Khetha sephutheli seo u batlang ho se batla ho

find-in-files-dir-from-active-doc-tip.value: Tlatsa sebaka sa Directory ho latela tokomane e sebetsang

find-status-top-reached.value: Fumana: Tokomane e fihletsoeng e qala, ketsahalo ea pele ho tloha tlase e fumanoe.

find-status-end-reached.value: Fumana: E fihlile pheletsong ea tokomane, ketsahalo ea pele ho tsoa holimo e fumanoeng.

find-status-replaceinfiles-1-replaced.value: Fetola ho Lifaele: Ketsahalo e le 'ngoe e ile ea nkeloa sebaka

find-status-replaceinfiles-nb-replaced.value: Fetosa ho Lifaele: $INT_REPLACE$ liketsahalo li ile tsa nkeloa sebaka

find-status-replaceinopenedfiles-1-repla.value: Fetola Lifaeleng Tse Butsoeng: Ketsahalo e le 'ngoe e ile ea nkeloa sebaka

find-status-replaceinopenedfiles-nb-repl.value: Fetola Lifaeleng Tse Bulehileng: $INT_REPLACE$ makhetlo a fetotsoeng

find-status-invalid-re.value: Fumana: Polelo ea kamehla e fosahetseng

find-status-replaceall-1-replaced.value: Tlosa Tsohle: Ketsahalo e le 'ngoe e ile ea nkeloa sebaka

find-status-replaceall-nb-replaced.value: Tlosa Tsohle: $INT_REPLACE$ liketsahalo li ile tsa nkeloa sebaka

find-status-replaceall-readonly.value: Tlosa Tsohle: Ha e khone ho fetola mongolo.Tokomane ea hajoale e baloa feela

find-status-replace-end-reached.value: Fetola: E fihlile pheletsong ea tokomane, e qalile ho tloha holimo.

find-status-replace-top-reached.value: Fetola: Tokomane e fihletsoeng e qala, e qala ho tloha tlase.

find-status-replaced-next-found.value: Fetosa: Ketsahalo e le 'ngoe e fetotsoe.Ketsahalo e latelang e fumanoe.

find-status-replaced-without-continuing.value: Fetosa: Ketsahalo e le 'ngoe e fetotsoe.

find-status-replaced-next-not-found.value: Fetosa: Ketsahalo e le 'ngoe e fetotsoe.Ha ho na liketsahalo tse ling tse fumanoeng.

find-status-replace-not-found.value: Kenya sebaka: ha ho ketsahalo e fumanoeng

find-status-replace-readonly.value: Fetola: Ha e khone ho fetola mongolo.Tokomane ea hajoale e baloa feela

find-status-cannot-find-pebkac-maybe.value: Ketsahalo e fanoeng ha e fumanehe.E ka 'na eaba u lebetse ho sheba "Qetella" (ho ON), "Match case" (ho TIMA), kapa "Bapisa lentsoe kaofela feela" (ho TIMA).

find-status-scope-backward.value: ho tloha qalong-ea-file ho ea ho caret

find-status-scope-forward.value: ho tloha ho caret ho ea qetellong-ea-file

find-status-invisible-chars-findWhat.value: Litlhaku tse sa bonahaleng ka har'a "Find what" or "Replace with" content

find-status-invisible-chars-findWhat-tip.value: Tlhokomeliso: Litlhaku tse sa bonahaleng sebakeng sa ho batla (kapa se nkela sebaka). Mongolo o kentsoeng sebakeng sena o kenyelletsa litlhaku tse sa bonahaleng (mohlomong tse qetellang ka mela).Ha u ka tsoela pele ntle le ho li hlakola, li tla kenyeletsoa tabeng ea ho batla (kapa e nkele sebaka).

finder-copy-selected-paths.value: Kopitsa Mabitso a Khethiloeng a Tsela

finder-wrap-long-lines.value: Ho thatela mantsoe mela e melelele

userdefined-title-save.value: Boloka Lebitso la Puo ea Hajoale Joaloka...

userdefined-title-rename.value: Reha Lebitso le Lecha la Puo ea Hona Joale

progress-cancel-info.value: E hlakola ts'ebetso, ka kopo ema...

replace-in-files-confirm-directory.value: Na u na le bonnete ba hore u batla ho fetola liketsahalo tsohle ho:

replace-in-projects-confirm-message.value: Na u batla ho khutlisa liketsahalo tsohle litokomaneng tsohle ho Phanele ea Morero?

replace-in-open-docs-confirm-message.value: A na u na le bonnete ba hore u batla ho khutlisa liketsahalo tsohle tse hlahang litokomaneng tsohle?

find-result-title-info.value: ($INT_REPLACE1$ e otla ho $INT_REPLACE2$ lifaele tsa $INT_REPLACE3$ tse batliloeng)

find-result-title-info-selections.value: ($INT_REPLACE1$ e otla ho $INT_REPLACE2$ likhetho tsa $INT_REPLACE3$ tse batliloeng)

find-result-title-info-extra.value: - Mokhoa oa Filter: hlahisa feela liphetho tse tlhotliloeng

session-save-folder-as-workspace.value: Boloka Sephutheli joalo ka Sebaka sa Mosebetsi

IncrementalFind-FSTopReached.value: E fihlile holimo leqepheng, e tsoela pele ho tloha tlase

IncrementalFind-FSEndReached.value: E fihlile qetellong ea leqephe, e tsoela pele ho tloha holimo

largeFileRestriction-tip.value:
Likarolo tse ling li ka liehisa ts'ebetso ho lifaele tse kholo.Likarolo tsena li ka koaloa ha u bula faele e kholo.U ka li etsa ka mokhoa o ikhethileng mona.
ELA HLOKO: 1. Likhetho tsa ho fetola mona li hloka ho bula hape lifaele tse kholo tse butsoeng hajoale ho fumana boitšoaro bo nepahetseng.
2. Haeba "Deactivate Word Wrap" e hlahlojoe 'me u bula faele e kholo, "Word Wrap" e tla emisoa bakeng sa lifaele tsohle.U ka e nolofalletsa hape ka menu ea "View-> Word Wrap".

npcNote-tip.value:
Kemelo ea litlhaku tse khethiloeng "tseo e seng tsa ASCII" le tse sa hatiseng (taolo).
ELA HLOKO: Ho sebelisa kemeli ho tla tima litlamorao tsa litlhaku mongolong.
Bakeng sa lenane le felletseng la libaka tse tšoeu tse khethiloeng le litlhaku tse sa hatisoeng, sheba Buka ea Mosebelisi.
Tobetsa konopo ena ho bula sebaka sa Marang-rang ka Buka ea Mosebelisi.

npcAbbreviation-tip.value:
Kgutsufatso : lebitso NBSP: sebaka se se nang khefu ZWSP : sebaka sa bophara ba zero ZWNBSP : sebaka se se nang khefu sa zero bophara
Bakeng sa lenane le felletseng, sheba Buka ea Mosebelisi. Tobetsa ho "?"konopo e ka ho le letona ho bula sebaka sa marang-rang ka Buka ea Mosebelisi.

npcCodepoint-tip.value:
Codepoint : lebitso U+00A0 : sebaka se se nang khefu U+200B : sebaka sa bophara ba zero U+FEFF : sebaka se se nang khefu sa zero-bophara
Bakeng sa lenane le felletseng, sheba Buka ea Mosebelisi. Tobetsa ho "?"konopo e ka ho le letona ho bula sebaka sa marang-rang ka Buka ea Mosebelisi.

npcCustomColor-tip.value: Eya ho Style Configurator ho fetola 'mala o tloaelehileng oa sebaka se khethiloeng le litlhaku tse sa hatisoeng ("'Mala oa tloaelo oa litlhaku tse sa hatiseng").

npcIncludeCcUniEol-tip.value: Sebelisa litlhophiso tsa ponahalo ea litlhaku tse sa hatisoeng ho C0, taolo ea C1 le Unicode EOL (moleng o latelang, searolahi sa mela le searohanyi sa lirapa).

searchingInSelThresh-tip.value: Bonyane palo ea litlhaku tse khethiloeng sebakeng sa ho hlophisa ho hlahloba ka bo eona lebokose la "Ho khetha" ha puisano ea Fumana e kentsoe tšebetsong.Theko e holimo ke $INT_REPLACE$.Beha boleng ho 0 ho thibela ho itlhahloba ka bohona.

searchingFillFindWhat-tip.value: Boholo ba litlhaku tse khethiloeng sebakeng sa ho hlophisa ho tlatsa ka bohona "Fumana eng" sebaka ha Ctrl-F e qala.Theko e phahameng ke $INT_REPLACE$, e leng boholo ba karolo ea "Fumana eng", e lekanyelitsoeng ke sistimi.

verticalEdge-tip.value: Kenya lesupa la kholomo ea hau ka ho bontša boemo ba eona ka nomoro ea decimal.O ka hlalosa matšoao a 'maloa a likholomo ka ho sebelisa sebaka se sesoeu ho arola linomoro tse fapaneng.

fileSaveAsCopySaveButton-tip.value: Tšoara Shift ha u ntse u tobetsa Save ho bula kopi ka mor'a ho boloka.

autoIndentBasic-tip.value: Netefatsa hore ho kenyeletsoa ha mola oa hajoale (ke hore mola o mocha o entsoeng ka ho tobetsa konopo ea ENTER) o lumellana le mola o fetileng.

autoIndentAdvanced-tip.value:
Numella indentation e bohlale bakeng sa lipuo tsa "C-like" le Python.Lipuo tsa "C-like" li kenyelletsa: C, C++, Java, C#, Objective-C, PHP, JavaScript, JSP, CSS, Perl, Rust, PowerShell le JSON.
Haeba u khetha mokhoa o tsoetseng pele empa u sa ntlafatse lifaele ka lipuo tse boletsoeng ka holimo, indentation e tla lula e le mokhoa oa motheo.

global-override-tip.value: Ho bulela "Global override" mona ho tla hlakola paramethara ka mefuta eohle ea lipuo.Seo mohlomong u hlileng u se batlang ke ho sebelisa litlhophiso tsa "Default Style" ho fapana le

scintillaRenderingTechnology-tip.value: E ka ntlafatsa tlhahiso ea litlhaku tse khethehileng kapa ea rarolla mathata a mang a litšoantšo, qala Notepad ++ hape ho sebelisa liphetoho.

toolbar-accent-tip.value: Khetho ena e etsa hore li-icon tsa toolbar tsa hau li latele 'mala oa mokhoa oa Windows.'Mala oa accent ke' mala o hlahelletseng o sebelisoang ho likonopo, meeling le lithaeleng tsa Start menu ho Windows.Ho e fetola, e ea ho Litlhophiso > Ho iketsetsa motho > Mebala, ebe u khetha 'mala oa lentsoe oo u o ratang.

len-limit-exceeded-tip.value: Tekanyetso ea bolelele e tlositsoe: Seo u se ngotseng se ka 'na sa feta moeli o lumelletsoeng, 'me se ka fokotsoa, ​​​​'me se ke ke sa bolokeha nakong e tlang.

max-len-on-search-tip.value: Seo u se ngotseng se ka feta tekanyo e lumelletsoeng, 'me se ka be se fokotsehile, 'me se ka se bolokehe nakong e tlang.

max-len-on-save-tip.value: Bolelele ba seo u se kentseng bo bolelele haholo 'me mohlomong ha bo bolokehe bakeng sa lenaneo le latelang.

tabbar-tabcompactlabellen-tip.value: E fokotsa bolelele bo bonahalang ba mabitso a li-tab tse telele.Kenya ho sebelisa boleng bo fanoeng.Boleng bo fapaneng: litlhaku tse 1-257 (0 e thibela ho fokotseha).
